Backend _clean_sentence_candidate() in server.py applies the same normalization for PDF/DOCX exports
extractSentenceFromSourceReports() correctly extracts sentence from completed reports in priority order
All 4 report types (quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log, barrister_view) display consistent sentence wording
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 98 verified exact sentence wording normalization.
